CustomField.description: Stores the API name of a custom unique identifier field on the Contact object used for matching during data import. When populated, the data import process uses this field instead of standard name/email matching to find existing Contacts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the API name of a unique ID field on Contact to use for matching (e.g., External_ID__c). Leave blank to use standard name and email matching.
CustomField.label: Contact Custom Unique ID
